{ "name": "didyoumean", "version": "1.2.2", "description": "Match human-quality input to potential matches by edit distance.", "homepage": "https://github.com/dcporter/didyoumean.js", "author": { "name": "Dave Porter", "email": "dcporter@gmail.com", "url": "http://dcporter.net/" }, "keywords": [ "didyoumean", "mean", "edit", "distance", "levenshtein" ], "main": "./didYouMean-1.2.1.js", "repository": { "type": "git", "url": "https://github.com/dcporter/didyoumean.js.git" }, "bugs": { "url": "https://github.com/dcporter/didyoumean.js/issues" }, "license": "Apache-2.0" }
